title: TopoGlyph Catalog Record
description: One record per module. Authored fields live in m/<id>/meta.json; build-index.mjs derives content_url, glyph_url, and hash.

id.description: Stable call number (※). Also the folder name under m/.

type.description: module = a TopoGlyph extension; prompt = a reusable prompt; artifact = a conversation output; expression = a standalone glyph.

topoglyph_version.description: Which TopoGlyph version/symbol set this module defines or assumes, e.g. "9.0".

summary.description: One or two sentences for index listings.

prompt.description: The prompt used to produce this module (markdown). Absent or null means 'not recorded'.

applications.description: Worked uses of the module. Each application is the prompt given to the model and the response it produced. Rendered under the library reader's Applications tab.

prompt.description: The prompt given to the model (markdown).

symbols.description: Glyphs introduced or relied on (⊞ᵢ index keys).

domain.description: Classification facet (⫷domain⫸): science, art, math, meta, ...

category.description: Primary subject category code (arxiv-style) used to group the module in the library, e.g. "mech-eng". The authoritative ordered taxonomy (code → display name) lives in tools/build-index.mjs and is emitted into index.json as `categories`.

generator.description: What produced this artifact, e.g. "fugu", "fugu-ultra", "claude-opus-4.8". Honest provenance (⊪).

parent.description: Predecessor record id for a revision (⊩).

content_url.description: Derived by build-index: path to module.md.

glyph_url.description: Derived by build-index: path to glyph.txt if present.

hash.description: Derived by build-index: sha256 of module.md (⊨ integrity seal).
